title: The Good, the Bad and the Mechanics
overview: Empress wakes up in a research lab.

title: Shooter Meets Hacker
overview: Norito asks Empress to bring supplies from a nearby hospital, but a Beehive lies there.

title: Master Sniper
overview: Upon saving Momiji from the Educational Institution, Empress attempts rescue of her friends.

title: Black Falls Down a Hole
overview: Empress learns they've got a month until the Orbital Elevator is complete. Dead Master re-appears.

title: Drink Because You Are Happy
overview: Norito asks Strength for help, but soldiers show up. Strength purges a part of herself.

title: Collapse
overview: Strength and Norito burst into the carrier to save Miya. They also find Lunatic.

title: Peacebuilding Force Memorial Library
overview: Black Trike can't self-repair, so they go to the Peacebuilding Force Memorial Library for the parts.

title: Crossing Iron Oceans
overview: Empress and the others are crossing the Iron Ocean. She notices Monica is acting strange.

title: Half Mechanic
overview: Empress wakes up in Light House No. 8.

title: Titanomachia
overview: Battle continues at Light House No. 8. The colonel is attacked by Charlotte, but Empress arrives.

title: The Moon Is a Harsh Mistress
overview: The colonel receives a message that the Iron Ocean is spreading, causing much confusion. Despite a message confirming that the Orbital Elevator is connected, the colonel tells everyone the plan is to get Empress close to the Elevator to destroy it. At the eleventh hour, the Peacebuilding Force begins their bombardment and the final battle begins.

title: Black Rock Shooter
overview: The deadly battle unfolds in the wastelands. Empress rejects Lunatic's offer, and makes it clear that she will fight to the very end. The colonel suffers a drone barrage and faces death. Strength and Dead Master have also sustained heavy damage, and the army is all but destroyed. Is there a way out of this hopeless situation?
